rawFiles.name: ../data-geography/data/localities.json
rawFiles.notes: Local canonical geography file used for reviewed rail station locality cross-links.

transforms: Matched GeoNames-backed rail terminal records to data-geography localities by exact or near-exact station place names, compatible governorate, and close coordinate distance.
Added full administrative hierarchy, locality name, source ID, and source reference to accepted rail records.
Held fuzzy or distant candidates such as Ash Shajarah, Bab al Hadid, Uwayja, Qurt Qulaq, and Damascus neighborhood-style station names for later review.
Did not change rail station coordinates or operational status.
reviewNotes: Added 16 reviewed rail station locality links from OpenSyria Data Geography. This raises rail terminal records with locality-level administrative links from 2 to 18 while keeping ambiguous rail matches held.
